title: Getting Bored ...
content:
!-/gallery /pbox_images/041006_014154.jpg !

The "Photo Blog":tbo x/archives/photo_blog/ (once a category within ThoughtsBox) is getting its own section. It will now called **pbox_images**. :D

I'll not move "Photo Blog":tbo x/archives/photo_blog/ over to this section though. It's better to make a __fresh-start__!!
<!--more-->
